rationale: The tank starts with 1,200 litres and loses 150 litres per day. After n days, water remaining is 1,200 - 150n. We solve 1,200 - 150n < 200 → 1,000 < 150n → n > 6.67. So on day 7 (Sunday), the tank first drops below 200 litres. Day 0 is Monday; day 6 is Sunday. Thus, Sunday is the correct answer, which corresponds to option B. Both solvers effectively chose Sunday, so the answer is unambiguous.
